equipmentMods.trinket: Starblades: Starblades have a 25% chance of striking twice.

equipmentMods.horn: Dragon Flame: Increase radius of fire breath area by 40%, and 33% chance to deal Triple Damage.

equipmentMods.trinket: Spinning Blade: Shoots a shuriken from each blade, dealing 25% damage. For each shuriken, the spinning blades get 15% additional damage.

equipmentMods.goblet: Eye of the Storm: Eye of the Storm will stay for an additional 1 second, and increasing Eye of the Storm damage by 33% per 57% growth in size.
Lightning Plasma: Lightning Plasma stays for an additional 0.75 seconds and deals +55% damage.
Семя Кракена: Щупальца теперь остаются на поле боя на дополнительные 1.8 секунды.
Fiery Totems: Creates a Wall of Fire in front of the player that deals 33% damage three times per second.
